subject: A vampire noble in opulent red and gold robes seated at a banquet table, raising a chalice; surrounded by lit candelabra and clustered goblets in a darkened gilded chamber
description: A pale vampire with dark, slicked hair sits behind a heavy banquet table cluttered with golden goblets and tall lit candelabra. The figure wears an elaborate red and gold robe with high collar, lifting a chalice as if mid-toast. Light pools warm and yellow in the foreground from the candle flames, while the background recedes into deep red and amber gloom suggesting a vaulted, gilded interior. The composition is symmetrical and theatrical, framing the vampire like an aristocrat presiding over a private feast. Wealth, ritual, and predatory composure are the visual notes — Orzhov decadence rendered as a still life of indulgence.
foreground: banquet table laden with golden goblets and lit candelabra; robed vampire raising a chalice
background: darkened gilded interior with deep red and amber tones, vaulted shadow
emotion: composed, predatory, aristocratic poise; faint smile of satisfaction
